---
title: "J. Coenen"
image: IMG_3161.JPG
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links: 
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:coenenj89@gmail.com
    - text: Research Gate
      icon: journal-text
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Jason-Coenen
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard-fill
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8Dmq4I4AAAAJ
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
